娼館の１室のドアが開き、<br><user>が勢いよく飛び込んでくる。:
The door to a room in the brothel opened, and the Commander burst
in.
ベッドの上には顔面蒼白のヒナギが寝かされ、<br>苦悶の表情で荒い呼吸を繰り返し: On the bed, Hinagi lay pale-faced, her breaths ragged and pained.
司令官、様……ごめんなさい……<br>ちょっと邪気払いに失敗してしまったみたいで:
Lord Commander... I am sorry... I seem to have failed somewhat in
purifying the evil aura...
ヒナギは<user>に呪詛を掛けた犯人を突き止め、<br>その邪気を浄化してしま:
Hinagi told the Commander that she had tracked down the culprit who
had cursed him and had purified the evil aura.
はい。その者の邪気を吸収してしまい、体内の気のバランスが乱れています。<br>私:
Yes. I absorbed the evil aura, and my ki is out of balance. Without an
Onmyoji of equal skill, at this rate...
ヒナギの表情が曇る。<br>彼女の容体が危険な状態なのは、その顔色を見れば明らか:
Hinagi's expression clouded. It was clear from her complexion that
her condition was critical.
……お前以外に陰陽師の心当たりはない。<br>他に方法はないのか……？:
...I don't know any other Onmyoji besides you. Isn't there another
way...?
司令官様が邪気に侵された時を思い出してください。<br>お薬も、回復魔法も通じな:
Please recall when you were afflicted by evil aura, Lord Commander.
Neither medicine nor Healing Magic worked... did they?
何かあるだろう！？ お前は俺にとって命の恩人だ！<br>今度は俺がお前を助ける番:
There has to be something! You're my lifesaver! This time it's my turn
to help you! Tell me anything!
フフっ……もったいないお言葉です……司令官様……<br>司令官様が私を……: Fufu... you are too kind, Lord Commander... Lord Commander, you...
ヒナギは、<user>の言葉にハッとなる。: Hinagi gasped at the Commander's words.
（そ、そうだった……。司令官様の持つ気の流れは『龍脈』そのもの……<br>司令官:
(O-oh, that's right... The Lord Commander's ki flow is the Dragon
Pulse itself... If it's the Lord Commander, then surely—)
その顔は、何か思いついた顔だな？<br>俺にできることなら遠慮なく言ってくれ！:
That look on your face... you've thought of something, haven't you? If
it's something I can do, don't hesitate to tell me!
は、はい……１つ、方法を思いつきました。<br>司令官様ならば私と同等の強い術式:
Y-yes... I have thought of one method. If it is you, Lord Commander,
you might be able to perform a spell as strong as mine.
ん？ 俺がお前と同じ技を……！？: Huh? Me, perform the same technique as you!
はい……『陰陽和合の秘術』が……: Yes... the Yin-Yang Harmony Secret Art...
それって、もしかして俺が意識を失った時にやった呪術なんじゃ……:
Wait, isn't that the curse magic you performed when I was
unconscious...?
はい。今からそのやり方をお伝えします。<br>もう少し、耳をお近くに寄せてもらっ:
Yes. I will explain the method now. Could you bring your ear a little
closer...?
ヒナギに顔を寄せると、<br>彼女は真っ赤になりながら、その方法を耳打ちしてくる:
As the Commander brought his face close, Hinagi, blushing furiously,
